latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.

status.title: Supporting the Local Radio Freedom Act.

cosponsors.fullName: Del. Radewagen, Aumua Amata Coleman [R-AS-At Large]

summaries.text: This concurrent resolution declares that Congress should not impose any new performance fee, tax, royalty, or other charge relating to the public performance of sound recordings on a local radio station for broadcasting sound recordings over the air, or on any business for such public performance of sound recordings.
